seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
mutation: composite: generalize the input from a plain capacitated bipartite matching to a full generalized assignment problem (per-(station,beacon) value AND bandwidth, heterogeneous station budgets, binding total capacity), and change the goal to maximize total station-dependent scientific value; the optimum becomes NP-hard and value-density greedy vs best-station greedy vs reassignment local search diverge.
title: Interstellar Relay: Beacon Uplink Assignment
strategies: first-fit baseline: scan stations in order, greedily grab any beacon that fits the remaining budget, ignoring value
value-density greedy: rank (beacon,station) options by value-per-bandwidth and assign each beacon to its best still-feasible station
best-station greedy: for each beacon pick the station giving highest value that fits, in a value-sorted order
reassignment local search with randomized restarts: seed from greedy, then repeatedly move/swap beacons between stations to improve total value while respecting budgets
